titleStmt.title: SII 31.40: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 40. (A.R. No. B 278 of 1936.) DĀMAGAṬLA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up against the prākāra wall of the temple of Bhōgīśvarasvāmi.
This record is dated Śaka 1233, Virōdhikṛti, Bhādrapada, śu. 2. Monday, corresponding to August 18, 1311 A.D.

It records the gift of a cow (modavu) for maintaining the oblation (divyadhāra) i.e. abhishēka to the god Bhōganāthadēva of Dāmagaṭla by Koppera Mallasānamma. She also constructed one bhēriśāla (a shed for keeping the drums) and presented one iron-drum (inupa-bhēri) to this temple. Dāmagaṭla is situated in the nāyaṁkara territory of Vīḍyamu Kommarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śaka jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1233 Agunēṁṭi virōdhakṛtsaṁvatsa
ra bhādrapada śu 2 sō . svastiśrī manma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara pratāpa rudradēva
mahārājulu pridhivījyamusēya
ṁgānu vīḍyamu kommarājunāyaṁkaṟamu
lōni dāmagaṭla kapparamallasānammaṁgāru
śrībhōganāṁdha dēvaraku paṭṭamu divya dhā
raku medavunicci Inupabhēri sēIṁcci
bhērisāla Ettiṁcenu . maṁgaḷamahā
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
